globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self' https://pokeapi.co https://beta.pokeapi.co; img-src 'self' data: https://raw.githubusercontent.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval';
globalHeaders.Permissions-Policy: accelerometer=(), camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(), gyroscope=(), magnetometer=(), payment=(), usb=()
